text: New addition:  Glenstone REIT (which already owns 24%) is considering a cash offer for the remaining shares (no price given).
New addition: formal £57m mixed cash and share offer by AMG Lithium
New addition: Ingredion makes £2.65bn indicative offer
Now indicative offer: Toscafund Asset Management makes proposal at 250p per share, Board "minded to recommend"
New addition: formal £29m offer by Vossloh
Board "minded to recommend" EQT's latest £60 per share proposal. PUSU deadline extended to 11 June
